zh.lifeSummary: 當Edward Seymour Viscount Beauchamp於1561年9月21日出生在英國米德萊可堂爾 本 倫敦時，他的父親Sir Edward Seymour22歲，母親Catherine Grey Countess Of Hertford21歲。他於1582年7月1日之前與Honora Rogers在英國英格蘭結婚。他們至少是4個兒子和3個女兒的父母。他去世於1612年7月13日在英國英格蘭維爾爾代維斯享年50歲，埋葬在英國維爾爾索爾茲伯里。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Edward Seymour Viscount Beauchamp于1561年9月21日出生在英国米德萊可堂爾 本 倫敦时，他的父亲Sir Edward Seymour22岁，母亲Catherine Grey Countess Of Hertford21岁。他于1582年7月1日之前与Honora Rogers在英国英格兰结婚。他们至少是4个儿子和3个女儿的父母。他去世于1612年7月13日在英国英格兰維爾爾代維斯享年50岁，埋葬在英国維爾爾索爾茲伯里。

nameMeanings.name: Seymour
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: English (London): of Norman origin, a habitational name from Saint-Maur-des-Fossés (Seine), and possibly also from Saint-Maur-des-Bois (Manche) and Saint-Maur-sur-Loire (Touraine), named from the dedication of their churches to Saint Maur (see   Moore   3). The family of this name who have held the title Duke of Somerset since 1547 are said by some to have originated in Saint-Maur-des-Fossés (Seine), while others claim they are from Saint-Maur-sur-Loire (Touraine). They rose to prominence under the Tudors, when Edward Seymour (died 1552) held a high position of office under Henry VIII, who was married to Edward's sister, Jane. The Norman name has been established in Ireland since at least the 17th century.

variants.name: Moore
meanings: English: from Middle English more ‘moor, marsh, fen’ (Old English mōr), hence a topographic name for someone who lived in such a place, or a habitational name from any of various places called with this word, as for example Moore in Cheshire or More in Shropshire.
English (of Norman origin): ethnic name from Old French more ‘Moor’, either someone from North Africa or, more often, a nickname for someone thought to resemble a Moor. Compare Morrell and Moreau .

English (of Norman origin): from the Middle English personal name More (Old French More, Maur, Latin Maurus), originally denoting either ‘Moor’ or someone with a swarthy complexion (compare Morrell , Morrin , Morris , and sense 2 above). There was a 6th-century Christian saint of this name.

variants.name: Semar
meanings: Germanized form of French Saint Marc, the name of a Huguenot family that migrated to the Palatinate.
English: variant of   Seymour  . This surname is very rare in Britain.

nameMeanings.name: Edward
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: From an Old English personal name derived from ēad ‘prosperity, riches’ + weard ‘guard’. This has been one of the most successful of all Old English names, in frequent use from before the Conquest to the present day, and even being exported into other European languages. It was the name of three Anglo-Saxon kings and has been borne by eight kings of England since the Norman Conquest. It is also the name of the youngest son of Queen Elizabeth II . The most influential early bearer was King Edward the Confessor ( ?1002–66 ; ruled 1042–66 ). In a troubled period of English history, he contrived to rule fairly and (for a time at any rate) firmly. But in the latter part of his reign he paid more attention to his religion than to his kingdom. He died childless, and his death sparked off conflicting claims to his throne, which were resolved by the victory of William the Conqueror at the Battle of Hastings. His memory was honoured by Normans and English alike, for his fairness and his piety. Edward's mother was Norman; he had spent part of his youth in Normandy; and William claimed to have been nominated by Edward as his successor. Edward was canonized in the 12th century, and came to be venerated throughout Europe as a model of a Christian king.

historicEvents.title: State Lottery
historicEvents.description: A State Lottery was recorded in 1569. The tickets were sold at St. Paul's Cathedral in London.

historicEvents.title: The Royal Exchange is Organized
historicEvents.description: The Royal Exchange was organized in January 1571 by Sir Thomas Gresham. Gresham is known as the father of English banking.

historicEvents.title: The First English Colony is Established in America
historicEvents.description: England established its first colony in North America in 1585 as a way to generate additional wealth. The colony was named Virginia, after the virgin Queen Elizabeth I.

historicEvents.title: Elizabeth I Signs Death Warrant for Mary, Queen of Scots
historicEvents.description: Elizabeth I signed the death warrant for Mary, Queen of Scots, on February 1, 1587, as she was found guilty of plotting to assasinate Elizabeth. Mary, Queen of Scots, was beheaded at Fotheringhay Castle in England on February 8, 1587.
historicEvents.urlTitle: Elizabeth I.org - Mary Queen of Scots

historicEvents.title: The Honourable East India Company
historicEvents.description: The Honourable East India Company, a British joint-stock company, was established in 1600 for trade in the Indian Ocean region. At its height, the British East India Company had a private army which was twice the size of the British Army, ruled large sections of India, and revenues in the millions.
historicEvents.urlTitle: Historic UK - The East India Company

en.lifeSummary: When Edward Seymour Viscount Beauchamp was born on 21 September 1561, in Tower of London, Middlesex, England, his father, Sir Edward Seymour, was 22 and his mother, Catherine Grey Countess Of Hertford, was 21. He married Honora Rogers before 1 July 1582, in England, United Kingdom. They were the parents of at least 4 sons and 3 daughters. He died on 13 July 1612, in Devizes, Wiltshire, England, United Kingdom, at the age of 50, and was buried in Salisbury, Wiltshire, England.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Edward Seymour Viscount Beauchamp est né le 21 septembre 1561, à Tower of London, Middlesex, Angleterre, son père, Sir Edward Seymour, avait 22 ans et sa mère, Catherine Grey Countess Of Hertford, avait 21 ans. Il a épousé Honora Rogers avant 1 juillet 1582, à Angleterre, Royaume-Uni. Ils ont eu au moins 4 fils et 3 filles. Il est décédé le 13 juillet 1612, à Devizes, Wiltshire, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni, à l’âge de 50 ans, et a été enterré à Salisbury, Wiltshire, Angleterre.

de.lifeSummary: Als Edward Seymour Viscount Beauchamp am 21. September 1561 in Tower of London, Middlesex, England geboren wurde, war sein Vater Sir Edward Seymour 22 und seine Mutter Catherine Grey Countess Of Hertford 21. Er hat vor 1. Juli 1582 in England, United Kingdom Honora Rogers geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 4 Söhne und 3 Töchter. Er starb am 13. Juli 1612 im Alter von 50 Jahren in Devizes, Wiltshire, England, United Kingdom und wurde in Salisbury, Wiltshire, England begraben.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Edward Seymour Viscount Beauchamp è nato il il 21 settembre 1561 nel Tower of London, Middlesex, England, il suo padre, Sir Edward Seymour, aveva 22 anni e il suo madre, Catherine Grey Countess Of Hertford, aveva 21 anni. Lui sposato Honora Rogers prima del 1 luglio 1582, nel Inghilterra, Regno Unito. Erano genitori di almeno 4 figli e 3 figlie. Morì il 13 luglio 1612, nel Devizes, Wiltshire, Inghilterra, Regno Unito, all'età di 50 anni, e fu sepolto a Salisbury, Wiltshire, England.

ja.lifeSummary: Edward Seymour Viscount Beauchampが1561年9月21日にイギリスミッドレセックストウエル オフ ロンドンで生まれた時，父Sir Edward Seymourは22歳，母Catherine Grey Countess Of Hertfordは21歳であった。1582年7月1日以前にイギリスイギリスでHonora Rogersと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも4人の息子と3人の娘の親であった。彼は1612年7月13日にイギリスイギリスウィルトシュアイアデヴィズスで50歳で死去し，イギリスウィルトシュアイアサリスブリーにて埋葬された。

ko.Tower of London, England: 영국 잉글랜드 미들레세스 타워 프 런던
ko.lifeSummary: Edward Seymour Viscount Beauchamp(이)가 1561년 9월 21일 영국 미들레세스 타워 프 런던에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 Sir Edward Seymour(은)는 22세였고, 그의 어머니 Catherine Grey Countess Of Hertford(은)는 21세였다. 그는 1582년 7월 1일 이전 영국 잉글랜드에서 Honora Rogers(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 네 명의 아들과 세 명의 딸을 두었다. 그는 1612년 7월 13일 영국 잉글랜드 윌츠히르 데비즈스에서 50세의 나이로 사망했으며 영국 윌츠히르 살리스버이에 묻혔다.

pt.Great Bedwyn, Wiltshire Unitary Authorit: Great Bedwyn, Wiltshire, Inglaterra, United Kingdom
pt.Tower of London, England: Tower of London, Middlesex, Inglaterra, United Kingdom
pt.lifeSummary: Quando Edward Seymour Viscount Beauchamp nasceu em 21 de setembro de 1561, em Tower of London, Middlesex, Inglaterra, seu pai, Sir Edward Seymour, tinha 22 anos e sua mãe, Catherine Grey Countess Of Hertford, tinha 21 anos. Ele casou-se com Honora Rogers antes 1 de julho de 1582, em Inglaterra, United Kingdom. Eles tiveram pelo menos 4 filhos e 3 filhas. Ele faleceu em 13 de julho de 1612, em Devizes, Wiltshire, Inglaterra, United Kingdom, com 50 anos, e foi sepultado em Salisbury, Wiltshire, Inglaterra.

ru.Tower of London, England: тоуир оф лондон, миддлесекс, Англия, Великобритания
ru.lifeSummary: Когда Edward Seymour Viscount Beauchamp родился 21 сентября 1561 г. в местности тоуир оф лондон, миддлесекс, Англия, его отцу по имени Sir Edward Seymour было 22 года, а матери, которую звали Catherine Grey Countess Of Hertford, 21. Он женился на женщине по имени Honora Rogers перед 1 июля 1582 г. в местности Англия, Великобритания. У них было по крайней мере 4 сына и 3 дочери. Он умер 13 июля 1612 г. в местности девизесь, уилцхир, Англия, Великобритания в возрасте 50 лет и был похоронен в местности салисбури, уилцхир, Англия.

es.21 September 1561–13 July 1612: 21 de septiembre de 1561–13 de julio de 1612
es.Great Bedwyn, Wiltshire Unitary Authorit: Great Bedwyn, Wiltshire, Inglaterra, Reino Unido
es.Tower of London, England: Tower of London, Middlesex, Inglaterra, Reino Unido
es.lifeSummary: Cuando Edward Seymour Viscount Beauchamp nació el 21 de septiembre de 1561, en Tower of London, Middlesex, Inglaterra, su papá, Sir Edward Seymour, tenía 22 años y su mamá, Catherine Grey Countess Of Hertford, tenía 21 años. Se casó con Honora Rogers antes de 1 de julio de 1582, en Inglaterra, Reino Unido. Fueron padres de por lo menos 4 hijos y 3 hijas. Murió el 13 de julio de 1612, en Devizes, Wiltshire, Inglaterra, Reino Unido, a la edad de 50 años, y fue sepultado en Salisbury, Wiltshire, Inglaterra.
